mnemonics: Blockchain Blocks Are Just Test Components (BBAJTC) - Each block in a blockchain is a test component for the chain's integrity.
keyPoints: A test component in blockchain refers to a specific part of the system, like a smart contract or a consensus algorithm, that is being verified.
Testing ensures components are secure, functional, and perform as intended before deployment on the main network.
Common testing methods include unit tests, integration tests, and testnet deployments.
commonMistakes: Assuming a component works perfectly after a single successful test, neglecting edge cases and stress testing.
Deploying a smart contract to the mainnet without thorough testing on a testnet first, leading to costly errors and vulnerabilities.
